title: Using Talk
subtitle: Draft mandates, refine with AI, and see what your community cares about.

steps.title: Open Talk
steps.description:
Click "Discuss & Draft" in the Talk secondary navigation. This is the civic workspace where you draft mandates for your elected representatives.

Talk works at three geographic levels:
- /talk/ — federal (USA)
- /talk/?state=7 — your state (e.g. Connecticut)
- /talk/?town=119 — your town (e.g. Putnam)

The breadcrumb at the top shows where you are: USA > State > Town.
steps.alt: The Talk page showing Discuss & Draft workspace

steps.title: Add a Draft
steps.description:
Type your idea in the prompt box at the top. You have two options:

- Click "Add" to drop your text directly into the draft workspace as a bubble.
- Click "Include AI" (or press Enter) to send your text to AI for refinement. Both your text and the AI response appear as separate bubbles.

You can also tap the microphone to dictate by voice.
steps.alt: The prompt box with Add and Include AI buttons

steps.title: Work with Drafts
steps.description:
Your drafts appear in the Discuss & Create Draft box, newest on top. Each bubble has:

- A draft ID (#1, #2, etc.)
- Edit button (pencil) — click to revise the text inline
- Delete button (x) — remove a draft you don't want

Iterate as much as you want — add ideas, include AI to refine them, edit the results, keep going until you're satisfied.
steps.alt: Draft bubbles in the workspace with edit and delete controls

steps.title: Check a Scope and Save
steps.description:
When a draft is ready, check one of four scope boxes on the bubble:

- Federal — for your U.S. congressional representatives
- State — for your state legislators
- Town — for your local town officials
- Idea — saves privately (not published)

Only one scope at a time. Checking a scope reveals a gold Save button. Click Save — the bubble is removed from the workspace and published to the Public Mandate Summary below.
steps.alt: A draft bubble with scope checkboxes and Save button

steps.title: Public Mandate Summary
steps.description:
Below the workspace, the Public Mandate Summary shows all saved mandates from your area. Use the tabs to filter:

- All — everything from your area
- Federal / State / Town — filter by scope
- My Mandates — only your published mandates
- My Ideas — your private ideas

You can vote (thumbs up/down) on anyone's mandate, and edit or delete your own.
steps.alt: Public Mandate Summary with filter tabs and vote buttons

steps.title: Voice Commands
steps.description:
When using the microphone, say "command" to enter voice command mode. Available commands:

- "add" — add dictated text as a draft
- "send" or "ask" — send to AI
- "check federal #3" — set scope on a draft
- "save #3" — save a draft
- "edit #3" — edit a draft
- "delete #3" — remove a draft
- "clear all" — clear the workspace
- "help" — list all commands

Say "command" again to return to dictation mode.
